title: MoreEyes
description: Adds Eye of Ender Style eyes to more structures
body:
## MoreEyes - More locator eyes!
![GitHub Downloads (all assets, all releases)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/erbium08/moreeyes/total?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&color=0d1117)
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/2ToRR19N?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=17b85a)
![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1375449?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=f16436)

A tiny mod that adds new locator-style eyes to Minecraft, letting you find structures like **fortresses, bastions, and ocean monuments** without having to use Chunkbase or similar tools. This is my first time making a releasable mod so please suggest any features or fixes to help me learn

---
👉 Github: https://github.com/Erbium08/MoreEyes

👉 CurseForge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/moreeyes

---

Currently on Fabric only for the following versions:
* 1.20.1
* 1.20.4
* 1.21.1
* 1.21.10
* 1.21.11


_Thanks to Nick-Ninj for the texture of the Eye of Fortress_
